brier_impact_estimate.impact_assessment: ALL 2020 test-set market_prob values derive from post_game_proxy odds. The V0 market_only Brier=0.244354 and V3 MARL_w50 Brier=0.244154 are computed on contaminated inputs. The apparent improvement of V3 vs V0 (Δ=-0.000200) cannot be attributed to genuine pregame market efficiency. P29 Brier numbers are not valid baselines for a pregame betting model.

timeline_tier_breakdown.note: From wbc_backend/mlb_data/historical_odds_ingestion.py QA run. mlb_odds_2025_real.csv is a post-season single snapshot scraped 2026-03-18/19. All 2430 games have only 1 snapshot taken after season ended. No genuine pregame time points exist.

decision_rationale: 0% pregame_safe coverage. 100% of rows classified as post_game_proxy. MEMORY 2026-03-20 confirms post-season single snapshot scrape. P1 w_market sweep suspended. P29 ablation results cannot serve as baseline.
